title: U.S. Strikes Iran After Iran Fires on Ship in Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Iran’s attack on a container ship came hours after a meeting between the foreign ministers of Iran and Oman about opening the strait to traffic.
summary_public: Iran’s attack on a container ship came hours after a meeting between the foreign ministers of Iran and Oman about opening the strait to traffic.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. Strikes Iran After Iran Fires on Ship in Strait of Hormuz
